checks.description: Navigate to /reports/restricted WITHOUT logging in -- verify an Access Denied / 403 response (proves anonymous access is properly blocked)
checks.evidence: HTTP Status: 403 (Access denied page title confirmed)

checks.description: Log in as admin via drush uli, navigate to /reports/restricted -- verify the page renders with content and HTTP 200 (proves permission-based access grants correctly)
checks.evidence: HTTP Status: 200, Page title: 'Restricted Reports | Drush Site-Install', Content: 'This is the restricted reports page. Only users with the "view restricted reports" permission can access this content.'
